start.title: Start here
start.lede: Direct routes into the pages people look for most: the federal chambers, the cantonal parliaments, and a way into many communes.
start.search_placeholder: Search a chamber, a canton or a commune…
start.communal_intro: Only communes with an elected parliament appear here (about 460 of some 2,100). Search above to jump in.

metas.start.title: Start here
metas.start.desc: Quick links into the parliaments of Switzerland and Liechtenstein: the federal chambers and their pages, every cantonal parliament, and a search for communal parliaments.
